He makes a point.  But then again, at this point do we still have anonymity in the ownership of Ranch Lake IV?  Doesn't everyone know by this time that LHW is the ultimate owner?  Is there anything wrong with telling the Govt that Ranch Lake IV is owned by Barretta which is owned by Wexner Personal Holdings Corp., which is owned by LHW? 
 
Gideon's view is why give them the info if the money that will be received is $14,000.  At this point, however, Gideon has already told the Govt that Baretta is the managing member of Ranch Lake IV and that WPHC is the Managing Member of Barretta.
 
Your thoughts?

I spoke with Madame Experton regarding her e-mails/faxes.  Experton filled me in regarding the proposed elevator installation by NOFA just under JEEs apartment.  She said that at he  last meeting she objected to the elevator being discussed because it had not been on the agenda.   She had also indicated that she believed JEE would object to such elevator installation becaus eof the noise level, etc.  Since then, NOFA has changed their plan and have opted to go with a hydaulic system that woulkd be quieter and all machinery would be located on teh bottom of the elevator.  Experton believes that if JEE objects to this there will still be a majority that will not oppose the installation.  She recommends getting an expert to go through the proposal and a noise expert - paid for by JEE.so that there is legitimate reason to object.  Additionally, before NOFA starts the work they are having a bailiff come to look at JEE apartment.  Experton believes this is favorable but believes
 it is to JEEs advantage to have a bailiff come on his behalf as well - at his expense to make a contradictory report.
 
On another note: Regarding the leak from NAsiff's apartment.  The water has not cause dany problems since the apartment has been vacated.SHe believes the water conditions will happen again once someone moves in.  SHe suggests fixing that.  She is sending a detailed e-mail to that effect, I believe, this evening.

I spoke with Madame Experton regarding her e-mails/faxes.  Experton filled me in regarding the proposed elevator installation by NOFA just under JEEs apartment.  She said that at he  last meeting she objected to the elevator being discussed because it had not been on the agenda.   She had also indicated that she believed JEE would object to such elevator installation becaus eof the noise level, etc.  Since then, NOFA has changed their plan and have opted to go with a hydaulic system that woulkd be quieter and all machinery would be located on teh bottom of the elevator.  Experton believes that if JEE objects to this there will still be a majority that will not oppose the installation.  She recommends getting an expert to go through the proposal and a noise expert - paid for by JEE.so that there is legitimate reason to object.  Additionally, before NOFA starts the work they are having a bailiff come to look at JEE apartment.  Experton believes this is favorable but believes it is to JEEs advantage to have a bailiff come on his behalf as well - at his expense to make a contradictory report.
 
On another note: Regarding the leak from NAsiff's apartment.  The water has not cause dany problems since the apartment has been vacated.SHe believes the water conditions will happen again once someone moves in.  SHe suggests fixing that.  She is sending a detailed e-mail to that effect, I believe, this evening.
